# Pull Request

Brief description of the changes in this PR.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] UI / UX change
- [ ] Chore / housekeeping
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor (no user-facing change)

## Changes Made

-

## Testing

- [ ] Manually tested in the browser (pages affected: …)

## Screenshots (if applicable)

Add screenshots for dashboard or layout changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (if needed)
- [ ] My changes generate no new ESLint or TypeScript **errors**

## Additional Notes

Related issues, API/backend dependencies, or rollout notes for reviewers.
